posts.cookedHtml:
Failed to create an item in monday.com

Invalid value for {“phone”=>“Work”, “countryShortName”=>“Phone”} on PhoneColumn. invalid value, please check our API documentation for the correct data structure for this column. Guide to Changing Column Values
